mapper.sql: select jf.ghjf_id, jf.spuuid, jf.djxh, jf.shxydm, jf.nsrmc, jf.nsrjc, jf.dept_id, jf.ghjgxzjb, jf.clghbj, jf.hyghbz, jf.sdghjg_dm, jf.sdghjgxzjb, jf.zgswj_dm, jf.zgswskfj_dm, jf.ssgly_dm, jf.ghlb_dm, jf.xtlb_dm, jf.zzjglx_dm, jf.hy_dm, jf.djzclx_dm, jf.dwlsgx_dm, jf.sblb_dm, jf.nssbrq, jf.pzxh, jf.pzmxxh, jf.skssqq, jf.skssqz, jf.zsswjg_dm, jf.skssswjg_dm, jf.skgk_dm, jf.dzsphm, jf.pzzl_dm, jf.pzzg_dm, jf.pzhm, jf.kpy_dm, jf.kpy_xm, jf.zspm_dm, jf.zszm_dm, jf.yskm_dm, jf.gzze, jf.sl, jf.ynse, jf.jmse, jf.yjse, jf.ybtse, jf.jkfs_dm, jf.jfhb, jf.jfzh, jf.jfhm, jf.jfhh, jf.jfyh, jf.rkrq, jf.jsbj, jf.jsrq, jf.jsczy, jf.jcghzh, jf.jcghhm, jf.jcghhh, jf.jcghbl, jf.jcghje, jf.cbjzh, jf.cbjhm, jf.cbjhh, jf.cbjbl, jf.cbjje, jf.hyghzh, jf.hyghhm, jf.hyghhh, jf.hyghbl, jf.hyghje, jf.xjghzh, jf.xjghhm, jf.xjghhh, jf.xjghbl, jf.xjghje, jf.sjghzh, jf.sjghhm, jf.sjghhh, jf.sjghbl, jf.sjghje, jf.szghzh, jf.szghhm, jf.szghhh, jf.szghbl, jf.szghje, jf.qgghzh, jf.qgghhm, jf.qgghhh, jf.qgghbl, jf.qgghje, jf.jcjzh, jf.jcjhm, jf.jcjhh, jf.jcjbl, jf.jcjje, jf.jcwsh, jf.sdszh, jf.sdshm, jf.sdshh, jf.sdsbl, jf.sdsje, jf.swjgzh, jf.swjghm, jf.swjghh, jf.swjgbl, jf.swjgje, jf.cbjthbj, jf.cbjthrq, jf.cbjthczy, jf.jym, jf.hkpch, jf.sdghzh, jf.sdghhm, jf.sdghhh, jf.sdghbl, jf.sdghje, hj.hjfl6_dm as xelx23, hj.hjfl4_dm as xelx24, hj.hjfl10_dm as xelx25, hj.hjfl9_dm as xwlx from gh_jf jf left join gh_hj hj on jf.djxh = hj.djxh
